description: Every Al-Qur'an feature the app has, plus the Indonesian Tarjamah Tafsiriyah offline, a local database, offline search, a khatam plan, and a hifz tracker no other Qur'an tool has.

tools.name: audio_surah
tools.description: Get the reciter->audio-URL map for a surah. Required: surah. Returns the AudioManifest.

tools.name: chapters_get
tools.description: Get background/introduction text for a chapter. Required: id. Optional: language (default: id). Returns the ChapterInfo.

params.name: language
params.description: Language code for the info text

tools.name: chapters_list
tools.description: List chapters with localized metadata. Optional: language (default: id). Returns array of Chapter.

params.name: language
params.description: Language code for names (e.g. id, en, ar)

tools.name: juz_list
tools.description: List all 30 juz with their verse mappings. Returns array of Juz.

tools.name: recitation_get
tools.description: Get the audio file URL for a chapter by reciter. Required: reciter, chapter. Returns the AudioFile.

tools.name: surah_get
tools.description: Get a surah with all verses and the Tarjamah Tafsiriyah translation. Required: id. Returns the SurahDetail.

tools.name: surah_list
tools.description: List all 114 surahs (Tafsiriyah source). Returns array of Surah.

tools.name: tafsirs_list
tools.description: List available tafsirs (other than Tafsiriyah). Optional: language (default: id). Returns array of Tafsir.

tools.name: uthmani_by-chapter
tools.description: Get clean Uthmani-script Arabic for a chapter. Required: chapter_number. Returns array of UthmaniVerse.

tools.name: verses_by-chapter
tools.description: List verses of a chapter with Arabic text. Required: chapter. Optional: language (default: id), fields (default: text_uthmani), per_page (default: 50) (plus 1 more). Returns array of Verse.

tools.name: websearch_query
tools.description: Search the Qur'an by word or meaning. Required: q. Optional: language (default: en), size (default: 20), page (default: 1). Returns array of SearchResult.
